questions.text: The image is formed on which part of the human eye?
questions.explanation: The retina is the light-sensitive screen at the back of the eye where the image is formed.

questions.text: Myopia is corrected using a concave lens.
questions.explanation: Myopia (near-sightedness) is corrected using a concave lens of suitable power.

questions.text: What is accommodation of the eye?
questions.correctAnswer: The ability of the eye lens to change its focal length to focus on objects at different distances.
questions.explanation: Accommodation is achieved by the action of ciliary muscles which change the curvature of the eye lens.

questions.text: The splitting of white light into its constituent colors is called ________.
questions.explanation: Dispersion is the phenomenon of splitting white light into seven colors (VIBGYOR) when passed through a prism.
